Operation 'createPurchase' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks detail about input requirements (PurchaseRequest schema fields) and side effects (referral tracking initiation, reward evaluation). Enhanced description clarifies what data is needed and what state changes occur in the system.

data.current_description: Registers a new purchase from the store and returns referral portal URLs
data.description_suggestion: Registers a new purchase from the store and returns referral portal URLs for the customer. Accepts purchase details including customer information, order amount, and transaction ID via PurchaseRequest schema. Triggers referral tracking and reward eligibility evaluation. Returns portal URLs for sharing referrals.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks detail about input requirements (PurchaseRequest schema fields) and side effects (referral tracking initiation, reward evaluation). Enhanced description clarifies what data is needed and what state changes occur in the system.

message: Operation 'getReferrals' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description is vague about output structure and filtering capabilities. Enhanced description specifies the return type (Referral objects), pagination support, and key fields returned to help AI agents understand what data they'll receive and how to filter results.

data.current_description: Retrieves referred purchases within a specified time period
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves referred purchases (Referral objects) within a specified time period. Supports filtering by date range and other criteria via query parameters. Returns paginated array of referrals with details including referrer, referred customer, purchase amount, and reward status.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is vague about output structure and filtering capabilities. Enhanced description specifies the return type (Referral objects), pagination support, and key fields returned to help AI agents understand what data they'll receive and how to filter results.

message: Operation 'updateReferral' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description lacks specificity about inputs, side effects, and outputs. Enhanced description clarifies required input parameters, explains business impact (reward/payout recalculation), and specifies the return value to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Updates the purchase status of a referred customer (e.g., mark as returned)
data.description_suggestion: Updates the purchase status of a referred customer to reflect order state changes (e.g., mark as returned, completed, or cancelled). Requires referral ID and new status in request body. Affects reward eligibility and payout calculations. Returns updated Referral object with new status.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks specificity about inputs, side effects, and outputs. Enhanced description clarifies required input parameters, explains business impact (reward/payout recalculation), and specifies the return value to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getReferrer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is vague about what 'referrer' means in context. Description lacks input requirements and output structure details. Enhanced description clarifies that it returns referrer contact information, specifies input requirements, and explains the null case for non-referred customers.

data.current_description: Retrieves the referrer of a particular customer
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the referrer information for a particular customer. Requires customer identifier (email or ID) as input parameter. Returns the referrer's Contact object including name, email, and referral details if the customer was referred; returns null if customer has no referrer.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague about what 'referrer' means in context. Description lacks input requirements and output structure details. Enhanced description clarifies that it returns referrer contact information, specifies input requirements, and explains the null case for non-referred customers.

message: Operation 'getContacts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic ('Query for contacts'). Description lacks clarity about what contact data is returned and filtering capabilities. Improved summary is more specific and action-oriented. Enhanced description specifies Contact object structure, pagination support, and available filters to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and output.

data.current_description: Returns paginated list of contacts enrolled in campaigns with purchase history
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of campaign contacts
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of Contact objects enrolled in campaigns, including their purchase history and referral activity. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Each contact includes name, email, campaign enrollment status, purchase count, and referral metrics.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Query for contacts'). Description lacks clarity about what contact data is returned and filtering capabilities. Improved summary is more specific and action-oriented. Enhanced description specifies Contact object structure, pagination support, and available filters to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and output.

message: Operation 'signupContact' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description mentions returning referral links but doesn't clarify the conditions under which they're returned or what happens on enrollment failure. Added clarity about enrollment outcomes, return values, and side effects (welcome communications) to help AI agents understand the full operation flow.

data.current_description: Adds a contact to the system and attempts campaign enrollment, returns referral links
data.description_suggestion: Registers a new contact in the system and attempts automatic enrollment in the active campaign. On successful enrollment, generates and returns personalized referral links for the contact to share. If enrollment fails, returns the contact record without referral links. This operation triggers welcome communications based on campaign settings.
data.reasoning: The current description mentions returning referral links but doesn't clarify the conditions under which they're returned or what happens on enrollment failure. Added clarity about enrollment outcomes, return values, and side effects (welcome communications) to help AI agents understand the full operation flow.

message: Operation 'inviteContact' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added context about enrollment requirement, what triggers the email (campaign template), required inputs, return value, and typical use cases. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus signup.

data.current_description: Sends a welcome email to an enrolled contact
data.summary_suggestion: Send welcome email to enrolled contact
data.description_suggestion: Sends a welcome email to an already-enrolled contact, triggering the campaign's welcome email template. Requires the contact's email address and campaign context. Returns confirmation of email delivery status. This operation is typically used to resend welcome communications or manually trigger invitations for existing contacts.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about enrollment requirement, what triggers the email (campaign template), required inputs, return value, and typical use cases. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus signup.

message: Operation 'updateSubscription' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description lack specificity about what subscription means in this context and the effects of state changes. Enhanced to clarify the bidirectional nature of the operation, required inputs, return value, and the business impact of subscription state changes for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Unsubscribe or resubscribe a contact from the program
data.summary_suggestion: Unsubscribe or resubscribe contact from program
data.description_suggestion: Modifies a contact's subscription status in the referral program, allowing them to be unsubscribed (opt-out) or resubscribed (opt-in). Requires the contact identifier and desired subscription state. Returns the updated contact record with new subscription status. Unsubscribing prevents the contact from earning rewards and receiving program communications; resubscribing restores full program participation.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about what subscription means in this context and the effects of state changes. Enhanced to clarify the bidirectional nature of the operation, required inputs, return value, and the business impact of subscription state changes for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getRewards' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what parameters are available and what the response contains. Enhanced to specify that it's a filtered query operation, mention the parameter count, describe the response structure, and provide context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns rewards matching specified criteria
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of rewards from the system filtered by specified criteria such as reward type, status, campaign, or date range. Accepts up to 5 filter parameters to narrow results. Returns an array of reward objects containing reward details, redemption status, and associated campaign information. Useful for auditing reward inventory or finding specific rewards for management.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what parameters are available and what the response contains. Enhanced to specify that it's a filtered query operation, mention the parameter count, describe the response structure, and provide context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'updateReward' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details about what status values are valid, required inputs, return value, and business implications of status changes. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

data.current_description: Updates the status of a custom reward
data.description_suggestion: Updates the status of a custom reward in the system, allowing state transitions such as active, inactive, or redeemed. Requires the reward identifier and new status value. Returns the updated reward object with new status and timestamp. Status changes may affect contact eligibility for reward redemption and program reporting metrics.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details about what status values are valid, required inputs, return value, and business implications of status changes. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

message: Operation 'getRewardPurchases' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is somewhat unclear about the relationship between rewards and purchases. Description lacks detail about available filters, required parameters, and response structure. Enhanced to clarify that this retrieves purchases linked to a reward, specify the parameter count, describe the response, and provide operational context.

data.current_summary: Query referred purchases for a reward
data.current_description: Returns referred purchases associated with a specific reward
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve purchases attributed to a reward
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of referred purchases that have been attributed to a specific reward, filtered by up to 4 criteria such as date range, purchase status, or referrer. Requires the reward identifier as the primary filter. Returns an array of purchase objects containing purchase details, referral attribution, and reward redemption status. Useful for tracking reward performance and validating referral attribution.
data.reasoning: Original summary is somewhat unclear about the relationship between rewards and purchases. Description lacks detail about available filters, required parameters, and response structure. Enhanced to clarify that this retrieves purchases linked to a reward, specify the parameter count, describe the response, and provide operational context.
